title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD's Methodology - Initial Results
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: CDP Awards Linde Double ‘A' for Climate Change and Water Security
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / December 16, 2022 / Linde (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) announced today it has been awarded a double 'A' from CDP for its approach to tackling both water security and climate change. CDP is a global non-profit organization that works with investors representing over $130 trillion in assets to measure how companies manage their environmental risk.

title: Linde Included in Dow Jones Sustainability World Index for 20th Consecutive Year
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / December 14, 2022 / Linde (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) announced today it has been included in the Dow Jones Sustainability World Index (DJSI World) and the DJSI North America. Linde is the only company in the chemicals sector that has been included in the DJSI World for twenty consecutive years.

title: Linde (LIN) Picks Cummins to Power New York Green Hydrogen Unit
text: The facility is likely to be Linde's (LIN) largest U.S. green hydrogen facility, representing significant progress in advancing the green hydrogen economy.

title: Linde Achieves Industry-Leading Score in S&P Global Corporate Sustainability Assessment
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / December 8, 2022 / Linde (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) announced today it has achieved an industry-leading score in the 2022 S&P Global Corporate Sustainability Assessment (CSA). The S&P Global CSA is a sustainability benchmark, which also serves as a basis for the Dow Jones Sustainability Indices (DJSI), S&P 500 ESG and other sustainability indices.
